spots.description: Coastal Heritage Museum is a beautiful museum destination in West Bengal, situated approximately 255km from Kolkata. It offers visitors a wonderful experience of the region's natural and cultural heritage, making it a must-visit location in East India.
spots.travel_information: Best time to visit: Winter months (Dec-Feb). Accessible by train from Kolkata. Entry fee: Free. Local guides available on site.

spots.description: East Heritage Complex is a beautiful heritage site destination in West Bengal, situated approximately 235km from Kolkata. It offers visitors a wonderful experience of the region's natural and cultural heritage, making it a must-visit location in East India.
spots.travel_information: Best time to visit: October to March. Accessible by road from Kolkata. Entry fee: ₹10 (Indians), ₹250 (Foreigners). Local guides available on site.
